title: Dirty Tonne Days Vlcc
summary:
Main
Tanker - Weekly Market Monitor
Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
Week 02, January 10, 2025
This week's focus highlights a downward trend in the AG supply of VLCC tankers (both spot/relet and contract), compared to the highs observed in October 2024. For the spot relet market, the performance of Baltic rates has not been fueling expectations for a strong start to this year. The recent growth in dirty tonne days to the Far East appears premature to support the full employment of available vessels.
